description: The ProtoFluxWireManager component is used to drive the visual elements of protoflux wires which connect protoflux nodes.

fields.ConnectPoint: The point this is supposed to be pointing to.
fields.Type: The type of wire this is supposed to be showing.
fields.Width: The width this wire should be.
fields.StartColor: The color this wire should start at. usually used for async impulse wires.
fields.EndColor: The end color this wire should end at. usually used for async impulse wires.
fields.DeleteHighlight: Whether to delete the highlight visual.
fields._wireMesh: The stripe mesh this is modifying.
fields._renderer: The renderer of the stripe mesh this is modifying.
fields._collider: The collider of this stripe mesh visual.
fields._targetPosition: The field to drive with the target position for the stripe mesh.
fields._targetTangent: The field to drive with the target tangent for the stripe mesh.
fields._targetOrientation: The field to drive with the target orientation for the stripe mesh.
fields._targetWidth: The field to drive with the target width for the stripe mesh.
